query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status ENUM('todo', 'in_progress', 'review', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'todo' NOT NULL,
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('content', 'design', 'ads', 'seo', 'social_media', 'analytics', 'other') DEFAULT 'other' NOT NULL,
  assignedTo INT,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  campaignId INT,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  estimatedHours INT,
  actualHours INT,
  tags TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_assignedTo (assignedTo),
  INDEX idx_campaignId (campaignId),
  INDEX idx_dueDate (dueDate)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status ENUM('todo', 'in_progress', 'review', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'todo' NOT NULL,
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('content', 'design', 'ads', 'seo', 'social_media', 'analytics', 'other') DEFAULT 'other' NOT NULL,
  assignedTo INT,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  campaignId INT,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  estimatedHours INT,
  actualHours INT,
  tags TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_assignedTo (assignedTo),
  INDEX idx_campaignId (campaignId),
  INDEX idx_dueDate (dueDate)
);
